title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: keepalived bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for keepalived is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The keepalived utility provides simple and robust facilities for load balancing and high availability. The load balancing framework relies on the well-known and widely used IP Virtual Server (IPVS) kernel module providing layer-4 (transport layer) load balancing. Keepalived implements a set of checkers to dynamically and adaptively maintain and manage a load balanced server pool according to the health of the servers. Keepalived also implements the Virtual Router Redundancy Protocol (VRRPv2) to achieve high availability with director failover.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): keepalived healthchecker threads stop permanently [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-81944)

full_text:
An update for keepalived is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The keepalived utility provides simple and robust facilities for load balancing and high availability. The load balancing framework relies on the well-known and widely used IP Virtual Server (IPVS) kernel module providing layer-4 (transport layer) load balancing. Keepalived implements a set of checkers to dynamically and adaptively maintain and manage a load balanced server pool according to the health of the servers. Keepalived also implements the Virtual Router Redundancy Protocol (VRRPv2) to achieve high availability with director failover.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): keepalived healthchecker threads stop permanently [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-81944)
